claim_support.reason: One severe unsupported claim identified: Q2 Free Cash Flow ($3,491M) in Financial Analysis Paragraph 3 lacks a corresponding evidence chunk in the authoritative citation list or evidence pack (only Q2 Operating Cash Flow is evidenced). Other claims are generally well-supported by the provided chunks.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Two severe issues: 1) 1-Year Stock Return is stated as 'approximately 254%' in Recent Developments but '302.97%' in Business & Competitive Analysis and Risk Analysis; the authoritative calc object supports 302.97%, making 254% inaccurate relative to the primary data source. 2) Revenue growth is consistently labeled 'Year-over-Year' (YoY) throughout the report, but the authoritative calc objects and visible data show sequential quarter comparisons (Q1 vs Q2 vs Q3), which is Quarter-over-Quarter (QoQ), representing a material misclassification of the financial metric.

citation_precision.reason: Severe mismatch in Recent Developments Paragraph 3: The text claims a 254% surge while citing authoritative calc ID 96737a69, which explicitly calculates a 302.97% return. The text aligns with a news snippet (fbc0bd54) but contradicts the cited authoritative calculation object.

temporal_validity.reason: All evidence dates (News, Filings, Symposia) are on or before the report As-of date (2025-11-12). No post-as-of data usage detected.

consistency.reason: Severe inconsistency: 1-Year Return is reported as 254% in Recent Developments but 302.97% in Business & Competitive Analysis and Risk Analysis. Additionally, the report consistently mislabels sequential quarterly revenue growth as Year-over-Year growth, contradicting standard financial definitions and the visible comparison periods in the calc objects.
